input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.2.4
            TITLE: the team presentation must relate specifically to the vehicle as entered in the competition

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.2.4: The team presentation must relate specifically to the vehicle as entered in the competition
S.2.2.4 The team presentation must relate specifically to the vehicle as entered in the competition

final_answer: The team presentation must relate specifically to the vehicle as entered in the competition
